---
title: "Key-notes of the First Lessons for Every Day in the Year. By Miss Yonge"
---

## Key-notes of the First Lessons for Every Day in the Year. By Miss Yonge

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1869
**Genre:** Non-fiction: theology
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** Published under the Direction of the Tract Committee. London: Society for Promoting Christian Knowledge. Sold at the Depositories 77 Great Queen’s Street, Lincoln’s Inn Fields Inn fields; 4 Royal Exc

### Notes

An early instance of CMY allowing her name to appear, though not in the form she ultimately adopted.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
